items.name: meilisearch-desktop

items.name: openclaw-autotrader
items.description: A public live journal of an OpenClaw-powered Tiger Pocket autotrader.  This repository tracks real position snapshots, decision changes, daily reports, and review notes from a small live trading account. It is updated whenever the market is open and a new decision is made.
